_comment: exp_018 — pass-2 stage-1 + exp_014 rescue stack. SINGLE-variable swap from exp_014: source_experiment exp_009_grpo → exp_017_pass2_stage1. Rescue model_id, rescue prompts, all token budgets, vLLM sizing, and stage-1 max_tokens are IDENTICAL to exp_014. Tests whether exp_017's +0.89pp stage-1 lift compounds with the exp_014 rescue stack. Target: ≥ exp_014 local 59.50% → submit.

rescue._model_id_note: Kept as the exp_009 GRPO model (NOT the new pass-2 model), to isolate the policy change to stage-1 only. The lesson from exp_014 was that the GRPO model rescued MCQ +1.33pp but did nothing for free-form. Swapping the rescuer to pass-2 would mix two variables; do it as exp_019 if exp_018 wins.

notes: Identical to exp_014 except source_experiment + stage1_dataset_name. Same rescue prompts, same rescuer model, same token budget, same vLLM sizing. This is the cheapest test of whether pass-2's stage-1 lift compounds with the existing rescue stack.
